goal: Strengthen v0 release closeout by requiring transferred real-adapter evidence bundle archives to include builder metadata that matches strict bundle verification before promotion.
head: 45a18c2
blocked_scope: Changing verifier acceptance policy or weakening release gates
Editing M6 review docs to GO
Creating or committing model weights, adapters, Docker images, endpoint transcripts, copied external evidence bundles, or GO release evidence
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may strengthen archive metadata/provenance validation for real-adapter evidence bundle promotion, update focused closeout tests, and refresh current NOT_GO recertification artifacts only.
required_evidence: Archive promotion rejects GO archives that omit build_real_adapter_evidence_bundle metadata files.
Archive metadata manifest and verification decisions must match the strict verification computed after extraction.
Focused promotion and closeout tests cover metadata-positive and metadata-negative archive cases.
Current v0 readiness remains expected NOT_GO with real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as the sole release blocker.
No release GO is claimed from current local artifacts.
executed_verification_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 ./.venv/bin/python scripts/run_v0_release_blocker_recertification.py --expected-readiness-decision NOT_GO --expected-bundle-decision NOT_GO --expected-training-status NOT_READY_CUDA_LORA_TRAINING --expected-rc-status NOT_READY_PRECHECK_FAILED (rerun with host Docker access after sandbox recorded permission denial)
warnings: The current host still lacks real trained adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence.
This gate tightens release closeout tooling only; it does not create or promote release evidence.
The first recertification run was repeated with host Docker access because sandboxed Docker access recorded a permission-denied diagnostic.

phase_notes.plan: Require builder metadata inside transferred real-adapter evidence bundle archives before promotion.
phase_notes.audit: Archive extraction is path-safe, but archive promotion currently verifies fixed evidence files without requiring the archive metadata emitted by build_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py.
phase_notes.build: Patch promote_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py and focused tests so archive closeout requires manifest/verification metadata consistency.
phase_notes.check: Run focused promotion/closeout tests, current NOT_GO recertification, JSON validation, search evidence, and diff checks.
phase_notes.done: After verification passes, stage, commit, and push this release tooling hardening phase.

pabcd.approved_scope: Real-adapter bundle archive metadata/provenance validation, focused tests, WORKING state, and PABCD only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product behavior changes, no verifier acceptance weakening, no M6 GO doc edits, no adapter/model/Docker evidence commits, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
